testcase.name: SessionJwksController API error matrix > GET /.well-known/jwks.json > returns 200/201 when JWKS signing material is configured
StynxSessionsModule integration > publishes JWKS publicly and mirrors create/revoke events into auth.sessions
StynxSessionsModule integration > propagates tenant revocation over Redis pubsub within 100ms
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 101.75054100000034 to be less than 100 ❯ test/integration/sessions.module.spec.ts:302:43
